metadata.description: Turn any topic or coding session into a beautiful, dark-mode, mobile-first one-page explainer you can read in ~5 minutes — and double-click to open offline. Works in Claude Code, or as a standalone MCP server / CLI in any editor.

plugins.name: recap-studio
plugins.description: Turn a topic or a git diff into a beautiful, dark-mode, mobile-first one-page explainer in ~5 minutes. Output is ONE self-contained HTML file — inlined CSS, zero JS — that opens with a double-click, offline. Specialist agents draft it; a deterministic board checks structure + citations. Reusable HTML template; works in Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, the terminal, and more.
